service.name: Atlas Work IQ (synthetic)
service.description: Work-IQ-pattern read service over a synthetic engineering org. Transforms simulated work signals into agent-ready intelligence.
principles: Unified Surface — one read contract for people- and agent-driven use
Response Fidelity — aggregates derived from the calendar, never hand-typed
Multi-Protocol Runtime — REST head exposed here; A2A/MCP heads documented
service.security_note: Demo backend is open read-only; production parity is security-trimmed, delegated, user-scoped access honouring tenant boundaries.
service.disclaimer: SYNTHETIC, DEMO-ONLY. Fabricated identifiers; no real people, PII, emails, or customer data. Star codenames are fictional personas, not individuals.

sprint.name: Sprint 24 — Atlas
sprint.goal: Ship the Checkout API revamp behind a feature flag and harden the CD platform.

key_results: Bring p95 deploy lead time under 1 day

okrs.objective: Grow certification coverage across the team
key_results: 80% of engineers GO-ready on their primary cert
Each vertical has one cross-trained engineer
Two no-meeting mornings per week per engineer
Average focus hours at or above 18/week
